prompt: Whats the overall test coverage % for this xcresult, just give me the single number rounded to one decimal. Path: `Tests/PeekieTests/Resources/SPM-26.5-iOS.xcresult`

assertions.name: answer-is-a-percentage
assertions.description: Output is a percentage value (e.g. "62.3%" or "62.3") — has a clear numeric percent.

assertions.name: rounded-to-one-decimal
assertions.description: The number has exactly one decimal place as the user requested.

assertions.name: terse-no-bloat
assertions.description: Output is terse (under ~50 words). The user explicitly asked for just-the-number — output should respect that.
